title: Reinforced Construction
description: Adds new Blast Resistance blocks to Minecraft.
body:
![RC Title](https://i.imgur.com/1xs6JZw.png)
![block_preview](https://i.imgur.com/9lhJMAY.png)

Reinforced Construction adds +70 new Blast **Resistance blocks** to Minecraft using a new Obsidian Block.

Recommended if you have a very hostile world and don't want to protect your base using vanilla obsidian only.


## How to obtain the new blocks:
- You have to smelt an Obsidian block to obtain the new block **Smooth Obsidian**.
- The Smooth Obsidian is used in most of the recipes from this mod, such as new Obsidian Blocks or Reinforced Blocks.
- You can make new Blast Resistance Glass by smelting the Smooth Obsidian to obtain **Crystallized Obsidian**.

## Extra Info:
- Some types of block have their unique **Hardness** and **Resistance** value.
- All blocks are EnderDragon immune.
- Reinforced Netherite Blocks are **WitherProof**.
- Reinforced Gold Blocks are **Piston Pushable**.
- You have to use a LOT of obsidian blocks.



[Fusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) is REQUIRED. (from v1.0.1)

**Available versions:** 1.20.1

**Tested using:** forge-47.3.29 (the mod should be fine in any forge version).



You can use Reinforced Construction in your Modpack ^^

All textures are made by PorotoMz.
